feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Heavy blow for oil exporting groups! UAE to exit OPEC, OPEC+ amid Strait of Hormuz disruptions: What it means #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries or OPEC is a group of major oil-producing nations. This group coordinates their petroleum production policies to help effectively manage global oil supply and influence crude prices.

entry.title: Peso sinks past 61 vs $1, a new record low #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine peso fell to a fresh record low on Tuesday, breaching the 61-per-dollar level for the first time as a broadly stronger US dollar weighed on Asian currencies during a packed week of central bank meetings, including a Federal Reserve decision clouded by uncertainty over the Middle East conflict. The local

entry.title: AboitizPower Q1 earnings surged 71% #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Aboitiz Power Corp. started 2026 with a profit surge of 71 percent thanks to strong capacity buildout. The company said in a disclosure on Tuesday its net income rose to P7.9 billion from P4.6 billion a year earlier. The firm’s beneficial earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization also jumped by 35

entry.title: WHERE TO INVEST: Market darlings wobble: Afrimat and Clicks stumble as Capitec retains premium investor love #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Investor sentiment is shifting as Afrimat and Clicks face pressure from setbacks and valuation strain, while Capitec continues to defy gravity, highlighting how quickly market favourites can fall from grace.

entry.title: GM expects a whopping $500M tariff refund after Supreme Court strikes down levies #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: GM anticipates paying $2.5 billion to $3.5 billion in tariff costs for 2026, the company said Tuesday, down from an original estimate of $3 billion to $4 billion.

entry.title: The 95% Club: Why Nearly Every American Stopped Trading Their 401(k) #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The image of the retail day trader hunched over four monitors, scalping options between Slack messages, has dominated financial media since the meme stock era. The reality inside the average 401(k) plan looks nothing like that. According to Vanguard’s 2025 How America Saves report, only 5% of nonadvised participants made any portfolio exchanges in 2024, ... The 95% Club: Why Nearly Every American Stopped Trading Their 401(k)

entry.title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.

entry.title: Coca-Cola anticipates 8%-9% comparable EPS growth in 2026 as it maintains 4%-5% organic revenue outlook #HowlStreet #Markets

entry.title: ‘I hope to retire early’: I’m 56 and have 80% in a traditional IRA and 20% in a Roth. Am I in trouble? #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: “We have $3.5 million in savings — $2.5 million of which are in retirement accounts.”

entry.title: Can Meta make money on AI beyond consumer ads? That’s a big question going into earnings. #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: While Meta Platforms has shaped up to be good at monetizing artificial intelligence in consumer-facing advertising, some analysts question whether the company’s AI models have applications beyond that.

entry.title: Strategy-fueled bitcoin rally could last ‘for some time to come,’ Bitwise CIO says #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Strategy issuing STRC has helped the company accumulate over $7 billion worth of BTC in recent weeks, Bitwise says.

entry.title: Iran conflict worsens Somalia’s malnutrition crisis, raises food costs #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The Iran conflict's impact on Somalia highlights the vulnerability of global supply chains and the potential for regional crises to escalate food insecurity. The post Iran conflict worsens Somalia’s malnutrition crisis, raises food costs appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: UnitedHealth and Humana Soar in April: Which Healthcare Stock Is Winning and Why #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Shares of UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) are up 4% at midday Tuesday, trading near $368, while Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock is also up 4% to $233. Both managed care names are extending one of the most aggressive sector rebounds of 2026. UnitedHealth stock is up 36% from $270.59 at the end of March, while Humana stock is ... UnitedHealth and Humana Soar in April: Which Healthcare Stock Is Winning and Why

entry.title: Treasury Moves To Require More Reporting And Paperwork From Tax-Exempts #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: IRS plans to revise Form 990 to better “detect misconduct.” The move comes days after the Trump DOJ brought controversial criminal charges against the SPLC.

entry.title: Trump misrepresents Merz on Iran nukes, US-Iran deal odds plummet #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Trump's misrepresentation and military tensions diminish diplomatic prospects, highlighting challenges in US-Iran relations and market volatility. The post Trump misrepresents Merz on Iran nukes, US-Iran deal odds plummet appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: HAMLET HOMES RAISES $45,000 FOR HOMEAID UTAH, GETTING ROUGHLY 45 HOMELESS UTAHN'S OFF THE STREETS PERMANENTLY #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: HAMLET HOSTS A 'BLOCK PARTY' TO WRAP SEASON SIX OF ROCK THE BLOCK ON HGTV. THOUSANDS OF UTAHN'S ATTEND, RAISING MONEY TO HELP FIGHT HOMELESSNESS IN UTAH. SALT LAKE CITY, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Season seven of Rock The Block is on its third week and is set in Las Vegas, Nevada....

entry.title: Alchemy and Privy roll out technical integration to smooth pain points of ‘onchain finance’ #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Alchemy and Privy are rolling out a technical integration in an attempt to smooth the pain points of using crypto.
